name: NCR Voyix Corp
summary: Our Business NCR Voyix is a global platform-powered leader in unified commerce for shopping and dining, empowering customers to simplify transactions, optimize and scale operations and deliver superior experiences to customers through our modernized suite of microservices-based applications and comprehensive service offerings.
